docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,625.00 FILED BY HUGHSTON, BOOT AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 - SERVED NOV-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUGHSTON, BOOT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN $1,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,075.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,710.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL (NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT) TO DEFENDANT NATHAN WALSH, "NO SUCH NUMBER/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUGHSTON, BOOT AS TO ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,400.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED - RE: HEARING ON OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (MARK SUTTON);REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE. FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) (MARK SUTTON) FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET-COVER SHEET RECEIVED FROM LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT FOR 06/08/2017 HEARING.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR JUN-08-2017 IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICE IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARRINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT; AS AGREED BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BOOT HUGHSTON. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NATHAN WALSH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALSH, NATHAN
